tasks.title: Phase 0: audit past nightly failures and produce taxonomy
tasks.notes: All 11 runs failed identically — infra drift only, suite never ran. Output: docs/test/e2e-failure-audit-2026-05-13.md (commit 7b4ecbafa)

tasks.title: Phase 1: reproduce each failure category locally
tasks.notes: Static drift analysis confirmed Phase 0 root causes plus 4 schema/API drifts in test assertions. All drifts fixed (T-105-04). Commerce @p0 selectors validated — clean. host-07e guarded by test.fixme. No credential drift (T-105-03 N/A).

tasks.title: Phase 2a: fix credential drift (if surfaced)
tasks.notes: N/A — no credential drift found in Phase 0 or Phase 1 analysis.

tasks.title: Phase 2b: fix schema/API drift (if surfaced)
tasks.notes: 4 drifts fixed: DRIFT-2 api-helpers.ts createConversation wrong SQL cols (guest_user_id/host_user_id removed, status ACTIVE→OPEN); DRIFT-3 msg-01 host inbox wrong endpoint (/conversations→/conversations/owner) + paginated response type; DRIFT-4 e2e-10 response shape (data→data.items); DRIFT-5 e2e-08 BookmarkListResponse (data[]→data.bookmarks[]). host-07e DRIFT-1 guarded by test.fixme — deferred.

tasks.title: Phase 2c: fix infra drift (if surfaced)
tasks.notes: Fixed 3 stale script paths in e2e-nightly.yml. Commit 5b0515350. Root cause 1 (hospeda-admin filter) already fixed in staging before this branch.

tasks.title: Phase 3: re-enable cron + observe 3 successful runs
tasks.notes: Uncommenting cron schedule: '0 5 * * *' (02:00 ART = 05:00 UTC). Pending 3 consecutive successful nightly runs to mark completed.
